title: OPMOD
description: QoL Fabric Mod for the german OPSUCHT Server Network.
body:
## 🥇 OPMOD OPSUCHT Mod for 1.21.11
### Configure OPMOD with `/opmod`
## Our Features
📊 Trading - Auction & Market prices in the tooltip - Shard values in item tooltips - Shard widget with current shard exchange rates - ...and other small features
🧑‍🌾 Farming - Job Tracker Widget - Custom RTP Menu & Widget - AFK Warning for the Job System
🏠 Citybuild - Auto Fly
🎒 Inventory - Buttons with useful command hotkeys - Pet equipment slot in the inventory - Speed display (calculated) - Inventory value display - "Inventory full" warning - Item rarity background
👁️ Visuals - Custom Inspect Animation for all "Bohrer" types - Rainbow effect on high level enchants - Hide Custom Models that are on your head - ...and other small features
🛡️ Protection - Offhand Blocker - Sign Protection - Rename Protection
🌼 Minions - Chat notifications for Minions - Minion Menu Overlay
And additionally: - "k", "m" and "b" support for /pay and anvil inputs - `/signsearch ` - Search for text on signs! - `/signsearch` to reset
Take a look!: [Ingame Screenshots](https://modrinth.com/mod/opmod/gallery)

--- ## 📄 License & Disclaimer This mod is **not officially from OPSUCHT** and is **not affiliated** with the OPSUCHT team. Use at your own responsibility. © 2026 OPMOD Development Team
